title: Pillager Camps
description: A new structure that gives you a 3 wave fight against pillagers. Defeating them gives an achievement and an item that gives you bad omen 5
body:
A new randomly generated structure called the pillager camp. As well as some loot, it gives the player a challenge. Defeating them gives a custom item and an achievement. The item can give you bad omen 5 once at any time by using it. You can find them in plains biomes.

Make sure to /reload when installed and report any issues.

Note: This project uses experimental settings
